author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(geo): enable static map (algolia/react-instantsearch#1378)
body:
* refactor(GoogleMaps): remove useless condition on map ready in didUpdate

* refactor(GoogleMaps): use if / else statement rather than if with early return

* feat(GeoSearch): expose enableRefine prop

* feat(Provider): noop on change when refine is disabled

* feat(Provider): handle boundingBox changes in shouldUpdate

* test(GoogleMaps): always render when shouldUpdate return false

* feat(stories): add GeoSearch without refine

* refactor(stories): move Places to the bottom

* test(maps): update Provider test name with noop
